source.body_text_sample:
Our work
Impact
News & stories
About us
Get involved
Donate
Together, we go the last mile

Ending ultra-poverty requires the collective effort of all of us, including communities, partners, and individuals who believe that progress should benefit everyone.

Donate
Your generosity fuels lasting change.

When you give, you help families in last-mile communities earn more income, grow more food, improve their health and wellbeing, and build a more stable future.


When you give, you’re investing in possibility.


Donate now
Partner with us
Partnering for measurable impact.

We work with institutional donors, foundations, and impact investors who share our commitment to ending ultra-poverty through scalable, evidence-based solutions.


Proven ROI: Up to 19X social return within five years.

Transparency: Access to real-time data, dashboards, and field reporting.

Scalable models: Programs ready for replication across regions and contexts.

Connect with us
View partners
Careers
Join a team that builds pathways out of ultra-poverty.

At Raising The Village, we’re driven by curiosity, collaboration, and the belief that no village is too remote to reach. From data science and program design to field operations and partnerships, our 400+ teammates across sub-Saharan Africa and North America work together to deliver lasting change.


We look for people who want to learn fast, adapt faster, and make a measurable difference.


View current opportunities
RFPs
Collaborate with us.
